products.descriptor: Miniature single-axis Hall effect proportional thumb controller with IP67 seal

evidence.snippet:
#### SAT Series
Miniature Single Axis Hall Effect Thumb Controller
------------------------------------------------------
Single axis miniature proportional thumb controller. Integrated elastomer actuator provides ergonomic feel and IP67 above panel seal. Contactless Hall Effect technology provides precision control and long life operation. Low voltage, self-centering device provided with pre-programmed Analog output. Below panel mounting hardware and 28AWG cable included.

unresolved_questions: No NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claims found for any individual product; vendor displays a 'Made In USA' badge site-wide (Carlsbad, CA) but never uses the term NDAA, so all products are marked not_disclosed.
Blue UAS cleared-list status not mentioned anywhere in the corpus; all products marked unknown.

Many product-specific pages (HE3, SG, MFD, MSA, and others) were skipped in the mirror run — those pages might contain additional spec or compliance language but are unlikely to change the five classification fields given the comprehensive home-page descriptions already captured.
